---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Please do not include sensitive data

**Do not include protected health information (PHI)** or other sensitive personal data in this issue, logs, screenshots, or attachments.

If your bug involves clinical or sensitive datasets, describe the problem **abstractly** and use **synthetic/minimized examples**.

---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages if any).

## Steps to reproduce

Describe the steps clearly (bullets or numbering are both fine). If possible, include a minimal reproducible example.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- Package version (or commit hash):
- Installation method (pip/conda/editable/etc.):

## Additional context

Anything else that may help (relevant settings, configuration snippets **without** secrets/PHI, links to related issues).
